full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Finding papers matching strict exam criteria
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: This is how my professor is conducting exams for advance machine learning course can you help me choose the research paper based on the given instructions in pdf
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Helped identify three initial paper options that strictly followed the year, venue, and algorithm constraints.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Verified the suggested papers against the CORE A* venue list and 2009-2012 date range requirements in the PDF.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Final verification of the chosen paper
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Multiple Incremental Decremental Learning of Support Vector Machines (Karasuyama, Takeuchi) — NeurIPS 2009. Does this follow all criteria? If yes then give all details
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Confirmed final eligibility and generated the exact details needed for the Google Form submission.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Verified the method aligns with the 'SVM, kernel methods, or variants' mandatory requirement.

top_5_prompts.prompt: Multiple Incremental Decremental Learning of Support Vector Machines (Karasuyama, Takeuchi) — NeurIPS 2009. Does this follow all criteria if yes, then give all details
top_5_prompts.why_important: This was the most critical prompt as it secured my final paper choice and ensured it strictly met the computational feasibility and algorithmic alignment rules before locking it in.

top_5_prompts.prompt: This is how my professor is conducting exams for advance machine learning course. Can you help me choose the research paper based on the given instructions in pdf
top_5_prompts.why_important: Set the baseline for my search by filtering out hundreds of invalid papers and focusing only on CPU-feasible 2009-2012 CORE A* papers.

student_declaration.statement: I declare that this JSON file contains a complete and honest record of my LLM usage for Part A.
